title: K-200 Comms/Datalink Interface Control Document
text:
# K-200 Comms/Datalink Interface Control Document

Document number: MD-DOC-481-A. Revision: A. Type: ICD. Author: Aisha Mbeki. Created: 2024-11-26. Last modified: 2025-06-06. Status: Released.

This document defines the requirements, interfaces, and verification approach for the Comms/Datalink subsystem of the Kestrel K-200. Referenced parts: P-1144, P-1178.
